items.title: FITMENS Mens 4th of July Independence Day America Flag Graphic T-Shirts Short Sleeve Patriotic Tee
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: fitmens, mens, 4th, july, independence, day, america, flag, shirts, patriotic. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
